messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0093",
  "title": "Aarki 帮助打破增长天花板，持续超额达成 D90 ROI 目标成功案例",
  "page_index": 50,
  "page_range": "50-51"
}

Section text:
Aarki 帮助               打破增长天花板，持续超额达成  D90 ROI 目标成功案例
www.aarki.com
挑战与目标
重新激活《 Angry Birds 2 》的高价值流失用户
，并最大化其 长期投资回报（ ROI）。
Aarki 解决方案
基于监督式 AI 的再营销体系，持续提升 LTV 与
ROI
●基于应用内行为分析 构建高价值 LTV 用户分层
●运用预测模型 评估用户长期价值（ LTV），并
据此动态优化出价
●通过Aarki Creative Studio ，持续输出 数据
驱动、以效果为导向的创意素材关键成果
Aarki 帮助Rovio 成功重新激活高价值用户群体 ，在
推动ROI 持续增长 的同时，通过 AI 驱动的定向能
力与创意优化 ，进一步释放了长期用户价值 。
●D90 ROI 平均超出目标 1.7 倍
●D7 ROI 持续稳定达成（平均约 1.3 倍）
●D365 LTV 目标在 3 个月内达成
●在成功重新激活高价值用户的同时，实现预
算的高效规模化
“在Aarki 团队的支持与专业能力帮助下 ，
我们不仅达成了长期 ROI 目标，
也看到了整体投放表现的持续提升 。”
——Rovio 用户获取负责人
50

message.content:
This section provides retrieval-ready information to answer questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Mobile app user reactivation, AI-driven remarketing, long-term ROI/LTV optimization, performance marketing case studies.
- **Entities:** Aarki (solution provider), Rovio (client), Angry Birds 2 (target application), Aarki Creative Studio (creative optimization tool), Rovio User Acquisition Lead (quoted stakeholder).
- **Timeframes & Dates:** D3, D7, D90, D365 (standard performance measurement windows); 3-month period for achieving long-term LTV targets.
- **Definitions/Concepts:** D90/D7 ROI, D365 LTV, supervised AI remarketing system, high-value LTV user segmentation, predictive LTV modeling, dynamic bid optimization.
- **Procedures/Methods:** Conducting in-app behavior analysis for user segmentation; deploying predictive models to estimate LTV and dynamically adjust bids; utilizing Aarki Creative Studio for data-driven creative production; applying AI targeting and iterative creative optimization.
- **Claims/Results:** Successful reactivation of high-value churned users; consistent overachievement of ROI targets; rapid attainment of long-term LTV goals; efficient budget scaling alongside user reactivation; sustained overall campaign performance improvement.
- **Metrics:** D90 ROI exceeded target by an average of 1.7x; D7 ROI consistently achieved ~1.3x of target; D365 LTV target met within 3 months.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative performance metrics, direct client testimonial/quote, documented case study outcomes. (No specific tables or figures are detailed in the provided text.)

   - **Input Text:** A Chinese case study about Aarki helping Rovio (Angry Birds 2) reactivate high-value churned users, maximize long-term ROI, using AI-driven remarketing, LTV prediction, dynamic bidding, and creative optimization. Key metrics: D90 ROI exceeded target by 1.7x, D7 ROI consistently ~1.3x, D365 LTV target achieved in 3 months, efficient budget scaling. Includes a quote from Rovio's UA lead.

2.  **Identify Key Elements for Retrieval-Oriented Summary:**
   - *Topics:* Case study, user reactivation, ROI optimization, AI-driven remarketing, LTV prediction, mobile game marketing.

   - *Dates/Timeframes:* D3, D7, D90, D365 (ROI/LTV measurement periods), "3个月内" (within 3 months).
   - *Definitions/Concepts:* D90 ROI, D7 ROI, D365 LTV, 监督式 AI 再营销体系 (Supervised AI remarketing system), 高价值 LTV 用户分层 (High-value LTV user segmentation), 预测模型 (Predictive modeling for LTV), 动态优化出价 (Dynamic bid optimization).
   - *Procedures/Methods:* In-app behavior analysis for user segmentation -> Predictive LTV modeling -> Dynamic bid optimization -> Data-driven creative generation via Aarki Creative Studio -> AI-driven targeting & creative optimization.
   - *Claims/Results:* Successfully reactivated high-value churned users; consistently exceeded D90 ROI target by 1.7x; D7 ROI consistently ~1.3x; D365 LTV target met in 3 months; achieved efficient budget scaling while reactivating users; overall campaign performance improved.
   - *Metrics:* D90 ROI: 1.7x target; D7 ROI: ~1.3x target; D365 LTV: target achieved in 3 months.

response_text:
This section provides retrieval-ready information to answer questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Mobile app user reactivation, AI-driven remarketing, long-term ROI/LTV optimization, performance marketing case studies.
- **Entities:** Aarki (solution provider), Rovio (client), Angry Birds 2 (target application), Aarki Creative Studio (creative optimization tool), Rovio User Acquisition Lead (quoted stakeholder).
- **Timeframes & Dates:** D3, D7, D90, D365 (standard performance measurement windows); 3-month period for achieving long-term LTV targets.
- **Definitions/Concepts:** D90/D7 ROI, D365 LTV, supervised AI remarketing system, high-value LTV user segmentation, predictive LTV modeling, dynamic bid optimization.
- **Procedures/Methods:** Conducting in-app behavior analysis for user segmentation; deploying predictive models to estimate LTV and dynamically adjust bids; utilizing Aarki Creative Studio for data-driven creative production; applying AI targeting and iterative creative optimization.
- **Claims/Results:** Successful reactivation of high-value churned users; consistent overachievement of ROI targets; rapid attainment of long-term LTV goals; efficient budget scaling alongside user reactivation; sustained overall campaign performance improvement.
- **Metrics:** D90 ROI exceeded target by an average of 1.7x; D7 ROI consistently achieved ~1.3x of target; D365 LTV target met within 3 months.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative performance metrics, direct client testimonial/quote, documented case study outcomes. (No specific tables or figures are detailed in the provided text.)
